philosophy.notes: Keeps the utilitarian Chrome extension dashboard posture while supporting a white light mode and Agentic dark mode.

hierarchy.notes: Quick links sit above the two primary columns; active tabs and saved sessions have clear counts and actions.

execution.notes: Active and saved tab rows expose compact hover-only restore/delete controls, and the toolbar bin opens a temporary recovery record with restore actions.

specificity.notes: The aggregate search label covers web, active tabs, and saved sessions; the bin copy now specifically describes recoverable saved, clicked, and accidentally affected pages.

restraint.notes: Accent use is limited to primary action and selected group state; the light mode uses a plain white canvas.
